events.title: The Geezer Gig
events.description: Over fifteen years running and still going strong, this “Second Friday Tradition” is as reliable as the tides. You definitely don’t have to be a geezer to appreciate this community pow wow. Bob Woods is the most eminently tasteful guitarist in the foothills. The lifelong railroad man is too good to be this humble, while firmly planted behind the wheel of the locomotive. Doubling as a member of ZZ Top, drummer Skip Alan Smith relishes his role in powering the steam engine of the groove. Retro-coo
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Matt Axton & Bad Moon
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Some people say that songwriting is in their blood, but for Matt Axton, he’s got the lineage to back it up. His grandmother, Mae Boren Axton, co-wrote “Heartbreak Hotel” for Elvis Presley. His dad, legendary singer-songwriter Hoyt Axton, penned songs for Three Dog Night and Steppenwolf. Born in Lake Tahoe and now based in LA, Matt is carrying on the family tradition with a gusto all his own. Like a human jukebox, he’s got 300 of his own songs ready to go for our listening and da
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Moga Family Band w/ Cheyenne Skye & Brian Coe
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS The Moga Family Band are a rising star of the Nashville music scene blending super soulful vocals and funky hooks with jamband sensibilities. What started as a local secret is steadily blossoming into a national phenomenon. Fresh off their victory in the 2026 American Songwriter Road Read Talent Contest, the band is well on its way to cementing its status as festival favorites, securing spots at High Sierra Music Festival and Rooster Walk in Virginia. The six-piece band features
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Bart Budwig w/ Graham Farrow and Zach Peach
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS NOW Bart Budwig is a son of Idaho, a cosmic country crooner, a rousing trumpet player, and cryin’-style soul singer. His music is made up of seemingly incongruous parts; thrum & strum country rhythms, jazz guitar melodies, R&B vocals. When Bart sings, he draws out words into meditative mantras, whole note neologisms that keep you hanging on until his raspy voice trails off in a ragged edge. His music recalls the uncorked rock n’ roll spirituality of king mystic Van Morrison, the
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Green Buddha Hot Summer Nights After Party
events.description: Since 2015, Green Buddha has set the bar in Colorado’s NoCoast reggae-rock scene. Their original sound mixes influences of reggae, funk, ska and New Orleans soul. Considered by some as Colorado’s best live reggae-rock band, Green Buddha delivers a blistering live performance experience, full of original songs that continue to captivate the hearts and minds of concert goers. In recent years, the band has played shows with The Wailers, Stephen Marley, Arise Roots and many more amazing artists at s
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Billy Strings - Live Streaming from Portsmouth, VA
events.description: We are thrilled that the hottest guitar picker in all the land is healed from his gruesome injury and is back on tour! We catch up with the action here in Portsmouth, VA as Billy and his band continue to slay everything in sight. The instrumental acrobatics are obviously the star, but Billy’s stage production has evolved to a very high level to captivate the crowds at these large venues. Watching it all go down on our big HD projection screen is the next best thing to be there. Enjoy the chill e
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Strange Daze - A Tribute to The Doors
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS The music of The Doors was a formative influence for so many of us in our childhoods and at many points throughout our lives. It was on the radio, it was on the tape deck, it swirled through our consciousness. Jim Morrison seemed like a mythical figure, inspiring men and tantalizing women with his poetic songwriting, showmanship and primal sex appeal. Back in April of ‘25, we decided it was time to bring a “proper” Doors tribute band to the Crazy Horse to immerse us in the feeli
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: GrooveSession Ft. Joe Marcinek
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS GrooveSession has a storied history at the Crazy Horse, having played countless performances here since 2014. These include a pair of New Year’s Eve shows to close out 2022. They are also on the short list of bands to land a coveted slot playing Nevada City’s Rosebud Ranch. To get a good idea of what they’re all about, look to their song called “Last Gig.” It centers on embracing every moment to its fullest and taking nothing for granted. We all need that reminder more than ever
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States
